title: Donation Drop Off Points - 211info

Helps connect individuals with other community resources and access mainstream benefits, including assistance with SNAP applications and local transit single-ride bus passes (which can be requested twice per month, subject to availability). Also, assists in completing forms to obtain ID and birth certificates, including limited payment assistance. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and other items. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with clothing, personal hygiene products, diapers, and showers. Also, assists in completing forms to obtain ID and birth certificates, including limited payment assistance. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and other items. 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. No large appliances are accepted. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FLORENCE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE FLORENCE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a wide variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat homes. 2016 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm -2nd Tuesday of the month 1pm-5pm Email (541) 997-5834 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GG'S HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides blankets, a preselected bag of food, clothing, diapers, household items, cleaning supplies, and toiletries. May be able to pick up materials. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOIN JOIN DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, blankets, sleeping bags, tarps, camping equipment, socks, underwear, hats, gloves, jackets, and hygiene items (shampoo, conditioner, razors, deodorant, feminine products, etc.) 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (971) 710-5768 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a donation point to drop off items such as clothing, hygiene products, pet supplies, and more. Also accepts financial donations. 12264 SW Hall Boulevard Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Small item donations (such as hygiene products and pet supplies): Drop off Monday 11am-1pm or by appointment -Large item donations (such as furniture, kitchen appliances, and large clothing donations): Drop off by appointment only Email (503) 624-4666 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEBANON AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY LEBANON HABITAT RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells wholesale donations (new) from distributors or small stores due to overstock or leftover inventory and new and gently used items donated by the community. Products may include hardware, tools, building materials, home goods, lighting, and furniture. 566 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Thursday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Drop Off Hours: Wednesday-Friday 10am-4pm, Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 451-1234 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and used items at a discounted price. Volunteer opportunities are available. Accepts new or used building materials, functional appliances and furniture, reusable or recyclable paint, vehicles (Cars for Homes), metal for recycling, and other reusable items. Donations are tax-deductible. 1040 SE 1st Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Donations: Hours vary visit website for donation drop off times Email (503) 434-6810 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MY FATHER'S HOUSE MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, cleaning supplies, paper products, diapers, office supplies, wrapping paper, bus tickets, grocery gift cards, and new toys. 5003 W Powell Boulevard Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-1pm (503) 492-3046 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVITY IN BEND FIREWOOD MINISTRY WOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides firewood to households; can receive wood once per month. Donated items must be in reusable condition. ReStore does not accept anything rusty, damaged, soiled, or inoperative. Donation receiver(s) may turn away donations of items at will based on current inventory maximums and non-accepted items. Item donation pick-up and delivery available. 801 N Meridian Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Thursday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm Pickup or Delivery: Thursday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (971) 281-1282 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXTSTEP RECYCLING AND REUSE STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLING DONATION CENTER NEXTSTEP RECYCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of computer hardware, household appliances, and scrap metal. 245 Jackson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 686-2366 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH WILLAMETTE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY CANBY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. Items needed vary by shelter. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter, community meals, showers, laundry, and a clothing closet. Case management services in regard to housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment, and life goals may be available on a case-by-case basis. 145 NE Revere Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults aged 18 and older and families with minorchildren. Unaccompanied youth under 18 not eligible. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 388-2096 - 830-5 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES REDMOND LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides overnight shelter, community meals 3 times a day, showers, laundry, commercial kitchen, and an emergency clothing closet. Individual case management services for housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment, and life goals are also available on a case-by-case basis. Residents can participate in faith based fellowship and discussion groups. Donations for clothing and household type items accepted. 1350 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults aged 18 and older and families with minorchildren. Unaccompanied youth under 18 not eligible. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 548-1772 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH COAST HUMANE SOCIETY SOUTH COAST HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store to raise money to benefit the agency's animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 16094 Hwy 101 South Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm (541) 469-5694 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift shop, household goods, bus passes for doctor appointments (no Greyhound tickets), prescription assistance, utility assistance (electric, housing gas, water, and propane), rent payment assistance, sheltering supplies (sleeping bags, tarps, and tents) and laundry assistance. Assistance is on a first-come, first-served basis and subject to available funds and amount of services previously given to an individual. Donations are not accepted Mondays.
